description:
This quiz evaluates a developer's practical understanding of modern CSS through multiple-choice questions designed to validate resume-level proficiency. Despite its casual and slightly provocative tone, the assessment targets intermediate to advanced concepts that challenge common misconceptions. It serves as a quick but rigorous competency check for frontend professionals.
Topics: Modern CSS, Frontend Development, CSS Fundamentals, Web Styling
Audience: Frontend developers, web designers, and software engineers seeking to validate or improve their CSS proficiency.
